subject: Geography
title: Arctic Resource Rush
description: A 1-minute de-risking session on Arctic Resource Rush.

hook.text: The Arctic may hold 30% of the world's undiscovered natural gas and 13% of its oil.

buildup.text: As ice retreats, mining companies eye deposits of rare earth minerals, gold, and diamonds.

discovery.text: Greenland's melting ice is exposing mineral deposits that were buried for millions of years.

twist.text: Extracting Arctic resources risks oil spills in freezing waters where cleanup is nearly impossible.

climax.text: The melting Arctic creates an ironic cycle—thawing unlocks fossil fuels that cause more thawing.

punchline.text: The ice melts and reveals the fuel that melted it.

quiz.question: What percentage of undiscovered natural gas may lie in the Arctic?
